text.title: Opportunity Solution Trees Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Opportunity Solution Trees. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: OST has 80+ nodes; no pruning in 3 months.
antipattern.fix: Mandatory monthly kill list; archive to archived-opportunities.md.
Pick one outcome per OST; spin up a sister tree if another outcome needs separate focus.

antipattern.symptom: Branches are features ('add notifications') with no parent opportunity.
antipattern.fix: Rewire: every solution must be moved under an opportunity, or removed.
Replace with freq x sev x addr; emit deltas weekly.
